rejections.concept: Seated at a coffee shop, sipping latte art, endless summer vibe. Shot: over shoulder, natural light.
Crowded street corner with a vintage Chanel bag, moody feeling. Shot: eye-level, film grain.
Simple necklace with a black ripped wig, punk vibe. Shot: two-way hang, street style.
Hand holding a tipped-up glass of red wine, simple glam vibe. Shot: macro, dim light.
Unknown place by a railroad track at sunset, boho western vibe. Shot: low angle, moody.
Leather jacket and ripped jeans, speeding motorcycle vibes. Shot: profile, action shot.
Messy bun and ox-blood boots, autumn leaves on the ground. Shot: full body, earthy tones.
simple striped scarf and fitted black over-pants, jazz club vibe. Shot: thigh shot.
white gloves and a silk top, old Hollywood vibe. Shot: close-up, grainy film.
misc toms kicks and a chunky knit sweater, ski resort vibe. Shot: half body, cool colors.
baseball cap and faded denim jacket, greek summer vibe. Shot: contour, sunny day.
gold hoop earrings and a baguette baguette, 90s vibe. Shot: detail, grainy.
anything green and lots of hair spray, space-age punk vibe. Shot: portrait, contour light.
